title: Assassination of Journalist  Aiyathurai Nadesan  in Broad Daylight 18 Years ago
body_lines: The death of any member of the journalistic fraternity is distressing. More so when a scribe is gunned down in broad daylight by ‘unknown’ assassins for the ‘crime’ of writing something that displeased people with pretensions of power.
The sadness is even more acute when the journalist was someone known to you for more than 25 years and had been immensely helpful as a source of accurate news and stimulating views.

Aiyathurai Nadesan who  served as Batticaloa correspondent of the Tamil daily “Virakesari”   was killed in broad daylight 18 years ago in the heart of  Batticaloa town. He was commemorated on Sunday May 29th at an event organized by fellow journalists  in the Batticaloa Library Auditorium. A book  was released in his memory.

No concrete action has been taken to investigate the murder so far. Nadesan was a friend whom I had known for over 25 years. I have written about Nadesan’s assassination, when he was killed. I shall however re-visit Nadesan’s killing with the intention of drawing attention to an unsolved murder of a journalist and friend.

Aiyathurai Nadesan was shot dead  on May 31st 2004 at about 9.35 a.m. in Batticaloa town. He was riding his motor cycle to work when the assailants shot him dead at point blank range on Boundary Road. Leaving his home on Lake Road, Batticaloa at 9. 20 a.m. Nadesan had followed his usual practice of picking up his Virakesari copy from the boutique next to the Virakesari office on Central Road.

Nadesan, though a journalist worked as an income tax assessor, too. He was going along Boundary Road and nearing his Bar Road office, when the assassins struck. Two men on a blue motor cycle — both wearing helmets — were the killers. At least four shots were fired at point blank range from a 9 mm. Two hit Nadesan’s shoulder and chest. One struck his hand. The killers whizzed away. There were many witnesses but none came forward to give evidence to the Police.

Nadesan’s bike knocked against a concrete lamp post and he was thrown off. Nadesan fell into a drain. The fall had resulted in his ribs getting fractured. He lay bleeding about 200 yards away from his workplace on Bar Road and died at the spot after a while.

The Bar Road-Boundary Road area is a very busy place in the morning. Many people saw Nadesan lying in the drain for a long time. Yet no one came to his aid. Such was the state of fear in Batticaloa during those times, that people were scared to display even the most basic human tendencies at times like these.

The people of Batticaloa were in the grip of two contending “terrorist” forces at that time. The clash for supremacy between the mainstream Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE) and the Batticaloa – Amparai dissident faction led by ex-tiger eastern commander Vinayagamoorthy Muraleetharan alias “Col” Karuna had led to a situation where lives were being snuffed out without restraint. People were afraid to talk freely as they did not know who supported Prabhakaran  and who supported Karuna.

It was left to a fellow journalist, Thurairatnam and the then TELO Batticaloa Organiser Indrakumar alias Prasanna to go to the spot, examine the body of the lifeless Nadesan,  and alert the authorities. The then Batticaloa Magistrate M. Ajmeer went to the place at about 11 a.m. and ordered that the body be taken to the hospital and handed over to the family after an inquest. This then was the sad tale of Nadesan’s demise.

Though a resident of Batticaloa for nearly 20 years, Nadesan was not an easterner. His wife Gowri was from Batticaloa. Nadesan however had adopted Batticaloa as his native place and integrated himself with the region.
He spotlighted the problems facing the people aptly. He was easily one of the best Tamil media journalists in the country at the time of his death.

The scribe  who was 49 at the time of his demise, hailed from Nelliaddy.Nadesan’s father Aiyathurai was a Cooperative Inspector with an impeccable reputation for honesty and integrity.  Nadesan’s house was down Chettitharai Lane between Nelliaddy Central College and the Vathiri Road junction.

Conforming to the practice adopted by many artistes and writers of adding their village name as a prefix Nadesan too used the condensed version of Nelliaddy “Nellai” before his name. It was as “Nellai Nades” that he wrote articles, short stories and poems during his school and undergraduate days.

When I first met him in 1977 while working at the Virakesari, he was known as Nellai Nades. Nadesan used to drop in frequently to meet the then Virakesari News Editor S. Nadarajah who was also from Anaipanthy in Nelliaddy. Later as a journalist, he used the by- line G. Nadesan. The ‘G’ denoted his wife Gowri.

Technically Nadesan was not a full-time journalist. He was an Income Tax Assessor by profession. He was a part time journalist but in practical terms the part time was full time. He was the Batticaloa correspondent for the Virakesari and also for Shakthi TV and radio. He also worked for the London based International Broadcasting Corporation. Given the volume and scope of his journalism, one could safely say that Nadesan was far more productive than many full-time journalists in the Tamil media those days.

After obtaining a degree in Business Administration, Nadesan became a teacher for a while. Later he joined the Inland Revenue Department as a clerk and subsequently became an Assessor. He used to write articles as a free-lance contributor to the Virakesari under his pen name “Nellai Nades.”
He later became the Virakesari’s Batticaloa Correspondent. Nadesan married in Batticaloa and settled down there. The “Nellai” gave way to ‘G’ (Gowri). They had four children, two boys and two girls.

The news of a Virakesari Batticaloa correspondent being killed on the line of duty was and is of poignant impact to me. One of the happiest and challenging periods of life for me as a journalist on the Virakesari was when I worked as Batticaloa staff correspondent for three months in 1977. (June and Nov – Dec). The Virakesari then had a brilliant journalist, V.S. Kathirgamathamby as Batticaloa correspondent. I had to replace him twice on a temporary basis then.

After Kathirgamathamby retired another close friend, Nithianandan became Batticaloa correspondent of the Virakesari. Nithy, an ardent Tamil nationalist got too involved with the LTTE. During the time of the IPKF, Nithy was viciously stabbed by some members of the pro-IPKF group, the EPRLF. Then Indian envoy J.N. Dixit arranged for immediate air lifting of Nithy to Colombo for urgent medical treatment at the request of Nithy’s journalist friends then.

After recovering Nithy worked in the Colombo Virakesari office. When the Indian army left he returned to Batticaloa and joined the LTTE as a full time member. He was later ambushed and killed by the Sri Lankan Army. Nadesan became the acting and later permanent Batticaloa Correspondent after Nithy.

Though the Police said that they had no idea who Nadesan’s killers were, the people of Batticaloa knew fully well, who they were. It was an open secret in Batticaloa that the killing was carried out by members of renegade leader “Col” Karuna’s  LTTE faction known as “Batticaloa-Amparai Liberation Tigers.”

Subsequently they formed a new politico-military organisation called “Thamil Makkal Viduthalaip Puligal”  (Tami Peoples Liberation Tigers). After killing Nadesan the Karuna faction of the LTTE tried to justify it by accusing him of being a Prabhakaran loyalist. The mainstream LTTE on the other hand tried to derive propaganda mileage by claiming him as one of their own.

Though a Tamil nationalist in the ’70s and ’80s of the last century, Nadesan was more of a leftist than an ethno – populist. When Tamil militancy grew, Nades was more aligned with the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) than the LTTE. Nades was closely associated with former EPRLF Northeastern Chief Minister Annamalai Varadarajaperumal.

Nades and Varathan had been contemporaries at the Jaffna University and had also taught together at a Nelliaddy tuition centre later. When the northeast provincial council was formed Nadesan got himself seconded from government service and got appointed as Varatharajaperumal’s press officer. I think his official title was ‘Information Officer.’ Ironically Nades was also an unofficial censor when the North -Eastern Provincial Council was in existence.

Nadesan discharged his duties efficiently. With the LTTE threatening the Tamil media on the one hand, it was a formidable task to project the northeast provincial council activities in a favourable light. Nades did so, often exerting ‘pressure’ on editors and management personnel. One editor told me how Nades would often utter veiled threats in order to get pro-EPRLF news published.

When the council was dissolved in 1990 and the bulk of EPRLF including Perumal fled from Sri Lanka, Nades did not follow suit. He opted to take his chances with the LTTE rather than fleeing the country to India. Nades was arrested as a ‘traitor’ by the LTTE and detained in a bunker prison. He was subjected to physical and mental torture. Nadesan’s stand was that he was only an employee of the Northeast Provincial Council, doing his duty.

Finally, Nadesan’s brother Sivanathan, a prosperous mill owner had to pay a hefty donation to secure his release. The LTTE that detained Nadesan as a traitor may very well have killed him in captivity like many others if not for the money being paid. After Nadesan was killed the same LTTE started showering patriotic titles and organising condolence meetings and protest demonstrations in his memory.

As a journalist living in Canada and writing about Sri Lanka, I kept in touch with Nadesan on the phone for several years. He was a reliable source of information about events in the east. Though he espoused a strong Tamil nationalist line he was by no means a LTTE acolyte.

Nevertheless he had to adopt a ‘safe’ course. Often he would tell me of happenings which he himself could never report in Sri Lanka. What he wrote in print and what he said on the phone were sometimes different. “We can’t write the whole truth. At least you do something,” he would say.

This was a tremendous existential problem encountered by Tamil journalists in the northeast. Having worked as provincial correspondent for the Virakesari both in Jaffna and in Batticaloa, I know only too well the pressures on the outstation correspondent. Later on, the war situation imposed an immense burden on these journalists. Even the brief interludes of fragile peace during the years of war did not bring any relief to the scribes in the northeast.

The scribes living in the North -east had to face indirect LTTE pressure in those days. There was also pressure from the armed forces and even other non-Tiger Tamil groups. However, the biggest threat was the LTTE and almost all Tamil newspapers in Sri Lanka toed a pro-Tiger line then.

While Tamil nationalism is the staple sustenance of the Tamil media, the LTTE factor brought about a qualitatively destructive change then. Against this backdrop one would hesitate to judge journalists in Nadesan’s position without having walked in their shoes.

Unlike some ‘bluff masters’ who plugged a Tiger line and peddled fantastic bits of propaganda to any buyer, ranging from intelligence agencies to the BBC, Nadesan had striven to present a correct picture of developments as far as possible. I often listened to his reports in the London based pro-LTTE IBC Radio. I also read his Virakesari Sunday column regularly.

The significant thing about the column was that he did not distort facts. He left out some ‘problematic’ details, but never wrote utter falsehoods. His comments too never went to the extent of unbridled LTTE sycophancy like some others.Nadesan himself was a Tamil nationalist and much of what he wrote was from that perspective. This however did not make him a ‘Tiger’ as both the LTTE and Karuna faction tried to portray him after his demise

The pro – Karuna website “Neruppu” which scooped the Nadesan killing described Nades as a “Wannippulippathirigaiyaalar” ( journalist of the Wanni tigers). Tarnishing a dead man’s name to justify a dastardly killing is a typical Tiger trait. The Karuna faction was no doubt adhering to its roots in this matter.

The Prabhakaran led LTTE began capitalising on Nadesan’s death. The Tigers organised a worldwide campaign condemning and mourning Nadesan’s death to obtain political mileage. A team of Tigers led by Senathi went to the funeral house and wrapped a Tiger flag around the body. Nadesan’s sister objected. The flag was removed.

Later Nadesan’s body was taken to the Northern Province for cremation at the Aalankatti cemetery in Vathiri. The LTTE took over the funeral arrangements.Homage ceremonies were organised in Vavuniya, Kilinochchi, Jaffna and Karaveddy. Nadesan’s body, now wrapped in a Tiger flag lay in state for people to pay their respects. The LTTE orchestrated large crowds of mourners. Leading LTTE figures spoke at the various ceremonies as well as the funeral itself. The LTTE organised a massive demonstration and hartal in the northeast to condemn the killing. Almost all the Tiger media started lamenting Nadesan’s loss ad nauseam.

Tiger media organs devoted much time and space to Nadesan. In typical Tiger fashion, fund raising in his memory commenced overseas. Fund raising to the LTTE was like a fire hydrant to a mongrel.The LTTE Leader Prabhakaran conferred upon Nadesan the posthumous title “Naatuppattraalar” (Patriot). By this action of dubbing Nadesan a patriot the LTTE tried to show the world that he was one of theirs.

Sadly all these efforts helped to strengthen the impression that Nadesan was a Tiger scribe. The truth however was different. This typical LTTE deception only helped to reinforce the Karuna Group charge that Nades was a Tiger associate.

The LTTE damaged Nades after his death by trying to “coopt” his image for their benefit. By doing so the LTTE distorted and diluted the widespread condemnation that should have arisen because an independent journalist was assassinated. Instead Nadesan was depicted as a Tiger in journalist garb. If the Karuna faction had taken Nadesan’s life, the LTTE had destroyed his reputation.

Whatever his faults or deficiencies, there is no doubt that “Nellai” Nades was mourning Nadesan’s death and clever craftsman. Most of his articles were well researched and had a lot of facts and figures. I have at times relied on his articles to get data and statistics.

Whatever his stance because of political compulsions, Nadesan’s death was a great loss to the Tamil community in general and the journalist fraternity in particular. Irrespective of the views he espoused, Nadesan’s killing has to be condemned forthrightly. It is also necessary to investigate this unsolved murder fully even  eighteen years later and mete out justice to those responsible for killing Aiyathurai Nadesan.
This Article Appears in the “Political Pulse”Column of the “Daily FT” dated  June 1st  2022.It can be accessed here-

si.title: වසර 18 කට පෙර මාධ්‍යවේදී අයියතුරෙයි නඩේසන් පුලුල් දවාලේ ඝාතනය
body_lines: මාධ්‍යවේදීන්ගේ සහෝදරත්වයේ ඕනෑම සාමාජිකයෙකුගේ මරණය කණගාටුදායක ය. ඊටත් වඩා, බලයේ මවාපෑම්වලින් මිනිසුන් අප්‍රසාදයට පත් කරන දෙයක් ලිවීමේ ‘අපරාධය’ සඳහා ‘නාඳුනන’ ඝාතකයින් විසින් ලේඛකයෙකුට මහ දවල් වෙඩි තබා මරා දැමූ විට.
මාධ්‍යවේදියා වසර 25කට වැඩි කාලයක් තිස්සේ ඔබ දන්නා හඳුනන අයකු වූ අතර නිවැරදි පුවත් සහ උත්තේජක අදහස් ප්‍රභවයක් ලෙස ඉමහත් උපකාරයක් වූ විට ඇති වූ ශෝකය තවත් තීව්‍ර විය.

“විරකේසරි” දෙමළ දිනපතා පුවත්පතේ මඩකලපු වාර්තාකරු ලෙස කටයුතු කළ අයියතුරෙයි නඩේසන් මීට වසර 18කට පෙර මඩකලපුව නගර මධ්‍යයේ දී මහ දවාලේ ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. මැයි 29 වැනි ඉරු දින මඩකලපුව පුස්තකාල ශ්‍රවණාගාරයේ දී සහෘද මාධ්‍යවේදීන් විසින් සංවිධානය කරන ලද උත්සවයකදී ඔහු ගුණානුස්මරණය කරන ලදී. ඔහුගේ අනුස්මරණය සඳහා පොතක් නිකුත් කරන ලදී.

ඝාතනය සම්බන්ධයෙන් මෙතෙක් කිසිදු නිශ්චිත ක්‍රියාමාර්ගයක් විමර්ශනය කර නොමැත. නඩේසන් මම අවුරුදු 25කට වැඩි කාලයක් හඳුනන යාළුවෙක්. නඩේසන් ඝාතනය වූ විට ඔහු ඝාතනය කිරීම ගැන මම ලියා ඇත. කෙසේ වෙතත්, මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකුගේ සහ මිතුරෙකුගේ නොවිසඳුණු ඝාතනයක් කෙරෙහි අවධානය යොමු කිරීමේ අරමුණින් මම නඩේසන්ගේ ඝාතනය නැවත බලන්නම්.

අයියතුරෙයි නඩේසන් 2004 මැයි මස 31 වැනි දින පෙරවරු 9.35 ට පමණ මඩකලපුව නගරයේ දී වෙඩි තබා ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. ඔහු සිය යතුරුපැදියෙන් වැඩට යමින් සිටියදී ප්‍රහාරකයින් ඔහුට මායිම් පාරේ හිස් පරාසයක වෙඩි තබා ඝාතනය කර ඇත. පෙරවරු 9. 20 ට මඩකලපුව ලේක් පාරේ පිහිටි සිය නිවසින් පිටත් වූ නඩේසන්, සෙන්ට්‍රල් පාරේ වීරකේසරී කාර්යාලයට යාබද කඩ සාප්පුවෙන් සිය වීරකේසරි පිටපත ලබා ගැනීමේ සුපුරුදු පුරුද්ද අනුගමනය කර ඇත.

නඩේෂන් මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු වුවද ආදායම් බදු තක්සේරුකරුවෙකු ලෙසද කටයුතු කළේය. ඔහු මායිම් පාර දිගේ යමින් බාර් රෝඩ් කාර්යාලය අසලට යමින් සිටියදී ඝාතකයන් පහර දුන්නේය. නිල් පැහැති යතුරුපැදියකින් පැමිණි දෙදෙනෙකු - දෙදෙනාම හිස්වැසුම් පැළඳ - ඝාතකයන් විය. අවම වශයෙන් මිලිමීටර් 9 සිට හිස් පරාසයක වෙඩි තැබීම් හතරක්වත් එල්ල කර ඇත. දෙකක් නඩේසන්ගේ උරහිසට සහ පපුවට වැදුණා. එකෙක් අතේ ගැහුවා. මිනීමරුවන් වහා පලා ගියහ. බොහෝ සාක්‍ෂිකරුවන් සිටි නමුත් කිසිවකු පොලිසියට සාක්‍ෂි දීමට ඉදිරිපත් වූයේ නැත.

නඩේසන්ගේ බයිසිකලය කොන්ක්‍රීට් ලාම්පු කණුවක හැපී ඔහු ඉවතට විසිවී ගියේය. නඩේසන් කාණුවකට වැටුණා. වැටීම නිසා ඔහුගේ ඉළ ඇටය කැඩී ගියේය. ඔහු තම සේවා ස්ථානයට යාර 200ක් පමණ දුරින් බාර් පාරේ ලේ ගලමින් වැතිර සිටි අතර ටික වේලාවකින් එම ස්ථානයේදීම මිය ගියේය.

බාර් රෝඩ් - මායිම් පාර ප්‍රදේශය උදෑසන කාලයේ ඉතා කාර්යබහුල ස්ථානයකි. නඩේසන් බොහෝ වේලාවක් කාණුවේ වැටී සිටිනු බොහෝ දෙනා දුටුවා. එහෙත් කිසිවකු ඔහුගේ පිහිටට පැමිණියේ නැත. ඒ කාලයේ මඩකලපුවේ තිබූ බිය කෙතරම්ද යත්, මෙවැනි අවස්ථාවලදී මූලික මිනිස් නැඹුරුවාවන් පවා ප්‍රදර්ශනය කිරීමට මිනිසුන් බිය විය.

ඒ වන විට මඩකලපුවේ ජනතාව සිටියේ සටන්කාමී "ත්‍රස්තවාදී" බලවේග දෙකක ග්‍රහණයේ ය. ප්‍රධාන ධාරාවේ දෙමළ ඊළාම් විමුක්ති කොටි සංවිධානය (එල්ටීටීඊ) සහ හිටපු කොටි නැගෙනහිර ආඥාපති විනයාගමූර්ති මුරලීදරන් හෙවත් කර්නල් කරුණාගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් මඩකලපුව - අම්පාර විසම්මුතික කන්ඩායම අතර ආධිපත්‍යය සඳහා ඇති වූ ගැටුම නිසා බාධාවකින් තොරව ජීවිත විනාශ වන තත්ත්වයක් උදා වී තිබුණි. ප්‍රභාකරන්ට සහය දෙන්නේ කවුද, කරුණාට සහයෝගය දෙන්නේ කවුද කියලා දන්නේ නැති නිසා මිනිස්සු නිදහසේ කතා කරන්න බය වුණා.

එම ස්ථානයට ගොස් පණ නැති නඩේසන්ගේ දේහය පරීක්‍ෂා කර බලධාරීන් දැනුවත් කිරීම සෙසු මාධ්‍යවේදී තුරෙයිරත්නම්ට සහ එවකට ටෙලෝ සංවිධානයේ මඩකලපුව සංවිධායක ඉන්ද්‍රකුමාර් හෙවත් ප්‍රසන්නට පැවරිණි. එවක මඩකලපුව මහේස්ත්‍රාත් එම්.අජ්මීර් මහතා පෙරවරු 11 ට පමණ එම ස්ථානයට ගොස් දේහය රෝහලට ගෙන ගොස් මරණ පරීක්ෂණයෙන් පසු පවුලේ අයට භාර දෙන ලෙස නියෝග කළේය. නඩේසන්ගේ වියෝව පිළිබඳ දුක්බර කතාව වූයේ මෙයයි.
වසර 20කට ආසන්න කාලයක් මඩකලපුවේ පදිංචිව සිටියද නඩේසන් නැඟෙනහිර වැසියකු නොවීය. ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ ගෞරි මඩකලපුවේ පදිංචිකාරියකි. නඩේසන් කෙසේ වෙතත් මඩකලපුව තම උපන් ප්‍රදේශය කර එම කලාපය සමඟ ඒකාබද්ධ විය.
ජනතාව මුහුණ දෙන ප්‍රශ්න උචිත ලෙස ඔහු පෙන්වා දුන්නේය. ඔහු මිය යන විට ඉතා පහසුවෙන් රටේ සිටි හොඳම දෙමළ මාධ්‍ය මාධ්‍යවේදියකු විය.

අභාවප්‍රාප්ත වන විට 49 වැනි වියේ පසුවූ ලේඛකයා නෙල්ලිඅඩි ප්‍රදේශයේ පදිංචිකරුවෙකි. නඩේසන්ගේ පියා අයියතුරෙයි සමුපකාර පරීක්ෂකවරයෙකි. නඩේසන්ගේ නිවස තිබුණේ නෙල්ලිඅඩි මධ්‍ය මහා විද්‍යාලය සහ වතිරි පාර හන්දිය අතර චෙට්ටිතරෙයි පටුමගේ පහළිනි.

බොහෝ කලාකරුවන් සහ ලේඛකයින් විසින් තම ග්‍රාම නාමය උපසර්ගයක් ලෙස එකතු කිරීමේ පුරුද්දට අනුකූලව නඩේෂන් ද ඔහුගේ නමට පෙර නෙල්ලිඅඩි "නෙල්ලයි" යන උකු පිටපත භාවිතා කළේය. “නෙල්ලයි නඩේස්” නමින් තමයි ඔහු පාසල් කාලයේ සහ උපාධි අපේක්‍ෂක කාලයේ ලිපි, කෙටිකතා, කවි ලිව්වේ.

1977 වීරකේසරියේ සේවය කරන විට මට ඔහුව මුලින්ම මුණගැසෙන විට ඔහු හැඳින්වූයේ නෙල්ලයි නඩේස් ලෙසයි. නෙල්ලිඅඩි ආනයිපන්ති ප්‍රදේශයේ සිටි එවකට වීරකේසරී ප්‍රවෘත්ති කර්තෘ එස්. පසුව මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු ලෙස ඔහු ජී.නඩේසන් යන අතුරු මාර්ගය භාවිතා කළේය. 'ජී' යන්නෙන් ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ ගෞරි සඳහන් විය.

තාක්ෂණික වශයෙන් නඩේසන් පූර්ණ කාලීන මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු නොවීය. ඔහු වෘත්තියෙන් ආදායම් බදු තක්සේරුකරුවෙකි. ඔහු අර්ධකාලීන මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු වූ නමුත් ප්‍රායෝගිකව අර්ධකාලීනව පූර්ණ කාලීන විය. ඔහු වීරකේසරි පුවත්පතේ මඩකලපුව වාර්තාකරු මෙන්ම ශක්ති රූපවාහිනියේ සහ ගුවන් විදුලියේ ද විය. ඔහු ලන්ඩන් පදනම් කරගත් ජාත්‍යන්තර විකාශන සංස්ථාවේ ද සේවය කළේය. ඔහුගේ පුවත්පත් කලාවේ පරිමාව සහ විෂය පථය අනුව, නඩේසන් ඒ දිනවල දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවල පූර්ණ කාලීන මාධ්‍යවේදීන් බොහෝ දෙනෙකුට වඩා බෙහෙවින් ඵලදායී වූ බව කෙනෙකුට ආරක්ෂිතව පැවසිය හැකිය.

ව්‍යාපාර පරිපාලනය පිළිබඳ උපාධියක් ලබා ගත් නඩේසන් ටික කලක් ගුරුවරයකු විය. පසුව ඔහු දේශීය ආදායම් දෙපාර්තමේන්තුවේ ලිපිකරුවෙකු ලෙස සේවයට බැඳුණු අතර පසුව තක්සේරුකරුවෙකු බවට පත්විය. ඔහු "නෙල්ලයි නඩේස්" යන පෙන් නාමයෙන් වීරකේසරියට නිදහස් දායකයෙකු ලෙස ලිපි ලිවීමට පුරුදුව සිටියේය.

පසුව ඔහු වීරකේසරී මඩකලපු වාර්තාකරු බවට පත් විය. නඩේසන් මඩකලපුවේ විවාහ වී එහි පදිංචි විය. "නෙල්ලයි" "G" (Gowri) ට මග පෑදුවේය. ඔවුන්ට පිරිමි ළමයින් දෙදෙනෙක් සහ ගැහැණු ළමයින් දෙදෙනෙක්, දරුවන් හතර දෙනෙක් සිටියහ.

මඩකලපුව වීරකේසරී වාර්තාකරු රාජකාරියේදී මරා දැමීමේ පුවත මට එදත් බලපෑවේ දැඩි බලපෑමක්. වීරකේසරි පුවත්පතේ මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු ලෙස මා හට ජීවිතයේ වඩාත්ම ප්‍රීතිමත්ම සහ අභියෝගාත්මක කාල පරිච්ඡේදයක් වූයේ මා 1977 වසරේ මාස තුනක් මඩකලපුව මාණ්ඩලික වාර්තාකරු ලෙස සේවය කළ කාලයයි. (ජුනි සහ නොවැම්බර් - දෙසැම්බර්). එදා වීරකේසරියට සිටි දක්ෂ මාධ්‍යවේදියකු වූ වී. කතිර්ගමතම්බි මඩකලපු වාර්තාකරු ලෙස. මට එදා එයාව දෙපාරක් ආදේශ කරන්න වුණා තාවකාලික පදනමින්.

කතිර්ගමතම්බි තවත් සමීප මිතුරෙකු විශ්‍රාම ගිය පසු නිත්‍යානන්දන් වීරකේසරී පුවත්පතේ මඩකලපු වාර්තාකරු බවට පත් විය. උග්‍ර දෙමළ ජාතිකවාදියෙකු වූ නිති එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යට ඕනෑවට වඩා සම්බන්ධ විය. IPKF සමයේදී, IPKF හිතවාදී කණ්ඩායමක් වන EPRLF හි සමහර සාමාජිකයින් විසින් Nithyට දරුණු ලෙස පිහියෙන් ඇන ඇත. එවිට ඉන්දීය නියෝජිත ජේ.එන්. එදා නිතිගේ මාධ්‍යවේදී මිතුරන්ගේ ඉල්ලීම පරිදි හදිසි වෛද්‍ය ප්‍රතිකාර සඳහා නිතීව වහා කොළඹට රැගෙන යාමට ඩික්සිත් කටයුතු කළේය.

නිතී සනීප වෙලා කොළඹ වීරකේසරි ඔෆිස් එකේ වැඩ කළා. ඉන්දීය හමුදාව ඉවත්ව ගිය පසු ඔහු නැවත මඩකලපුවට පැමිණ පූර්ණ කාලීන සාමාජිකයෙකු ලෙස එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ. පසුව ඔහු ශ්‍රී ලංකා හමුදාව විසින් සැඟවී සිට මරා දමන ලදී. නඩේසන් නිතීගෙන් පසු රංගනය සහ පසුව ස්ථිර මඩකලපු වාර්තාකරු බවට පත්විය.

නඩේසන්ගේ ඝාතකයින් කවුරුන්දැයි තමන් නොදන්නා බව පොලිසිය පැවසුවද ඔවුන් කවුදැයි මඩකලපුවේ ජනතාව හොඳින්ම දැන සිටියහ. මෙම ඝාතනය “මඩකලපුව-අම්පාර විමුක්ති කොටි” නමින් හැඳින්වෙන කැරලි නායක කර්නල් කරුණාගේ කොටි කල්ලියේ සාමාජිකයන් විසින් සිදු කර ඇති බව මඩකලපුව ප්‍රසිද්ධ රහසක් විය.

පසුව ඔවුන් "තමිල් මක්කල් විදුතලයිප් පුලිගල්" (තමි ජනතා විමුක්ති කොටි) නමින් නව දේශපාලන-මිලිටරි සංවිධානයක් පිහිටුවා ගත්හ. නඩේසන් ඝාතනය කිරීමෙන් පසු එල්ටීටීඊයේ කරුණා පාර්ශවය ඔහු ප්‍රභාකරන්ට පක්ෂපාතී බවට චෝදනා කරමින් එය සාධාරණීකරණය කිරීමට උත්සාහ කළා. අනෙක් අතට ප්‍රධාන ධාරාවේ එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය ඔහුව ඔවුන්ගේම කෙනෙකු ලෙස පවසමින් ප්‍රචාරක වාසිය ලබා ගැනීමට උත්සාහ කළේය.

පසුගිය සියවසේ 70 සහ 80 ගණන්වල දෙමළ ජාතිකවාදියෙකු වුවද නඩේසන් ජනවාර්ගික - ජනතාවාදියෙකුට වඩා වාමාංශිකයෙකු විය. දෙමළ සටන්කාමීත්වය වර්ධනය වූ විට, නඩේස් එල්ටීටීඊයට වඩා ඊළාම් මහජන විප්ලවවාදී විමුක්ති පෙරමුණ (ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ්) සමඟ පෙලගැසී සිටියේය. නඩේස් හිටපු ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් ඊසානදිග මහ ඇමති අන්නමලෙයි වර්දරාජපෙරුමාල් සමඟ සමීපව ඇසුරු කළේය.

නඩේස් සහ වරතන් යාපනය විශ්වවිද්‍යාලයේ සමකාලීනයන් වූ අතර පසුව නෙල්ලිඅඩි උපකාරක මධ්‍යස්ථානයක එකට ඉගැන්වූහ. ඊසානදිග පළාත් සභාව පිහිටුවන විට නඩේසන් රජයේ සේවයෙන් ස්ථීර වී වරතරාජපෙරුමාල්ගේ මාධ්‍ය නිලධාරියා ලෙස පත් විය. මම හිතන්නේ ඔහුගේ නිල නාමය වූයේ ‘තොරතුරු නිලධාරියාය.’ උත්ප්‍රාසාත්මක ලෙස උතුරු - නැඟෙනහිර පළාත් සභාව පවතින විට නඩේස් ද නිල නොවන වාරණයකි.

නඩේසන් තම රාජකාරිය කාර්යක්ෂමව ඉටු කළේය. කොටි සංවිධානය එක් අතකින් දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවලට තර්ජන එල්ල කරමින් සිටියදී ඊසානදිග පළාත් සභා කටයුතු වාසිදායක ලෙස ප්‍රක්ෂේපණය කිරීම බලවත් කාර්යයක් විය. Nades එසේ කළේ, බොහෝ විට සංස්කාරකවරුන් සහ කළමනාකාරීත්වය මත ‘පීඩනය’ යෙදවීමයි. ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් හිතවාදී ප්‍රවෘත්ති පළ කිරීම සඳහා නඩේස් බොහෝ විට සැඟවුණු තර්ජන කරන ආකාරය එක් කතුවරයකු මට කීවේය.

1990 දී කවුන්සිලය විසුරුවා හැර පෙරුමාල් ඇතුළු ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් බහුතරයක් ලංකාවෙන් පලා ගිය විට නඩේස් එය අනුගමනය කළේ නැත. ඔහු රටින් ඉන්දියාවට පලා යනවාට වඩා එල්ටීටීඊය සමඟ තම අවස්ථාව ලබා ගැනීමට තීරණය කළේය. නඩේස් එල්ටීටීඊය විසින් ‘ද්‍රෝහියෙකු’ ලෙස අත්අඩංගුවට ගෙන බංකර් බන්ධනාගාරයක රඳවා තබන ලදී. ඔහු ශාරීරික හා මානසික වධ හිංසාවලට ලක් විය. නඩේසන්ගේ ස්ථාවරය වූයේ ඔහු තම රාජකාරිය ඉටු කරමින් ඊසානදිග පළාත් සභාවේ සේවකයෙකු පමණක් බවයි.

අවසානයේදී, නඩේසන්ගේ සහෝදරයා වූ සමෘද්ධිමත් මෝල් හිමියෙකු වූ සිවනාදන්ට ඔහුව නිදහස් කර ගැනීම සඳහා විශාල පරිත්‍යාගයක් ගෙවීමට සිදු විය. නඩේසන් ද්‍රෝහියෙකු ලෙස රඳවාගෙන සිටි එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය මුදල් නොගෙවා වෙනත් බොහෝ අය මෙන් ඔහුව වහල්භාවයේ තබා මරා දමන්නට ඇත. නඩේසන් මරා දැමීමෙන් පසු එම එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යම දේශප්‍රේමී නාමයන් වැසීමට පටන් ගත් අතර ඔහු සිහිකර ශෝක රැස්වීම් සහ විරෝධතා පෙළපාලි සංවිධානය කිරීමට පටන් ගත්තේය.

කැනඩාවේ ජීවත් වෙමින් ශ්‍රී ලංකාව ගැන ලියන මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු ලෙස මම නඩේසන් සමඟ වසර ගණනාවක් දුරකථනයෙන් සම්බන්ධකම් පැවැත්වූවෙමි. ඔහු නැඟෙනහිර සිදුවීම් පිළිබඳ විශ්වාසදායක තොරතුරු මූලාශ්‍රයක් විය. ඔහු ප්‍රබල ද්‍රවිඩ ජාතිකවාදී රේඛාවක් ප්‍රකාශ කළද ඔහු කිසිසේත්ම එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.

එසේ වුවද ඔහුට 'ආරක්ෂිත' පාඨමාලාවක් අනුගමනය කිරීමට සිදු විය. ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ඔහුට කිසිදා වාර්තා කළ නොහැකි සිදුවීම් ගැන ඔහු බොහෝ විට මට කියයි. ඔහු මුද්‍රණයෙන් ලියූ දේ සහ දුරකථනයෙන් ඔහු පැවසූ දේ විටෙක වෙනස් විය. “අපිට සම්පූර්ණ ඇත්ත ලියන්න බැහැ. අවම වශයෙන් ඔබ යමක් කරන්න, ”ඔහු පවසනු ඇත.

මෙය ඊසානදිග දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවේදීන් මුහුණ දුන් දැවැන්ත පැවැත්ම පිළිබඳ ගැටලුවකි. වීරකේසරි පත්‍රයේ පළාත් වාර්තාකරු ලෙස යාපනයේ මෙන්ම මඩකලපුවේ ද කටයුතු කර ඇති මා පිට පළාත් වාර්තාකරුට එල්ල වන බලපෑම් ගැන හොඳින්ම දනිමි. පසු කාලීනව යුද වාතාවරණය මේ මාධ්‍යවේදීන්ට විශාල බරක් පැටවුවා. යුද්ධය පැවති වසරවල බිඳෙනසුලු සාමයේ කෙටි අතුරු සිදුරු පවා ඊසානදිග විනයධරයන්ට කිසිදු සහනයක් ගෙන දුන්නේ නැත.

උතුරු - නැඟෙනහිර ප්‍රදේශවල ජීවත් වූ ලේඛකයන්ට එදා වක්‍ර එල්ටීටීඊ පීඩනයට මුහුණ දීමට සිදු විය. සන්නද්ධ හමුදාවල සහ අනෙකුත් කොටි නොවන දෙමළ කණ්ඩායම්වල පවා බලපෑම් එල්ල විය. කෙසේ වෙතත්, විශාලතම තර්ජනය වූයේ එල්ටීටීඊය වන අතර ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ දෙමළ පුවත්පත් සියල්ලම පාහේ කොටි හිතවාදී රේඛාවකට එළැඹියේය.
දෙමළ ජාතිකවාදය දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවල ප්‍රධාන පෝෂණය වන අතර එල්ටීටීඊ සාධකය එදා ගුණාත්මකව විනාශකාරී වෙනසක් ඇති කළේය. මෙම පසුබිම තුළ මාධ්‍යවේදීන් සපත්තුවෙන් නොගොස් නඩේසන්ගේ තැන විනිශ්චය කිරීමට පැකිලෙනු ඇත.

බුද්ධි අංශවල සිට බීබීසී දක්වා ඕනෑම ගැණුම්කරුවෙකුට කොටි රේඛාවක් සවි කර අපූරු ප්‍රචාරක කොටස් ලබා දුන් සමහර 'බ්ලෆ් මාස්ටර්' මෙන් නොව, නඩේසන් හැකිතාක් වර්ධනයන් පිළිබඳ නිවැරදි චිත්‍රයක් ඉදිරිපත් කිරීමට උත්සාහ කර ඇත. ලන්ඩන් පදනම් කරගත් එල්ටීටීඊ හිතවාදී IBC රේඩියෝවෙන් ඔහුගේ වාර්තාවලට මම නිතර සවන් දුන්නෙමි. මමත් ඔහුගේ වීරකේසරී ඉරිදා තීරුව නිතරම කියෙව්වා.

තීරු ලිපියේ සැලකිය යුතු කරුණ වූයේ ඔහු කරුණු විකෘති නොකිරීමයි. ඔහු 'ගැටළු සහගත' තොරතුරු කිහිපයක් අත්හැරියේය, නමුත් කිසි විටෙකත් සම්පූර්ණ අසත්‍ය ලියා නැත. ඔහුගේ ප්‍රකාශයද වෙනත් සමහරක් මෙන් කිසිවිටෙකත් අසීමිත එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යේ තුච්ඡභාවය දක්වා ගියේ නැත. නඩේසන් දෙමළ ජාතිකවාදියෙකු වූ අතර ඔහු ලියූ බොහෝ දේ එම දෘෂ්ටිකෝණයෙන් විය. කෙසේ වෙතත්, එල්ටීටීඊය සහ කරුණා පාර්ශවය ඔහුගේ අභාවයෙන් පසු ඔහුව නිරූපණය කිරීමට උත්සාහ කළ නිසා මෙය ඔහු ‘කොටියෙකු’ බවට පත් කළේ නැත.

නඩේසන් ඝාතනය ගැන තොරතුරු හෙළි කළ කරුණා හිතවාදී වෙබ් අඩවිය වන “නෙරුප්පු” නඩේස්ව විස්තර කළේ “වන්නිප්පුලිප්පත්තිරිගයියාලාර්” (වන්නි කොටි මාධ්‍යවේදියා) ලෙසයි. ම්ලේච්ඡ ඝාතනයක් සාධාරණීකරණය කිරීම සඳහා මියගිය මිනිසෙකුගේ නම කැත කිරීම සාමාන්‍ය කොටි ලක්ෂණයකි. කරුණා පාර්ශ්වය මේ කාරණයේදී එහි මුල්වලට ඇලී සිටි බවට සැකයක් නැත.

ප්‍රභාකරන් ප්‍රමුඛ එල්ටීටීඊය නඩේසන්ගේ මරණය ප්‍රයෝජනයට ගැනීමට පටන් ගත්තේය. දේශපාලන වාසි ලබා ගැනීම සඳහා නඩේසන්ගේ මරණය හෙළා දකිමින් සහ ශෝකය පළ කරමින් කොටි සංවිධානය ලෝක ව්‍යාප්ත ව්‍යාපාරයක් සංවිධානය කළේය. සෙනතිගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් කොටි කණ්ඩායමක් මළ ගෙදරට ගොස් සිරුර වටා කොටි කොඩියක් ඔතා ඇත. නඩේසන්ගේ සහෝදරිය විරුද්ධ විය. කොඩිය ඉවත් කළා.

පසුව වතිරි ආලංකට්ටි සුසාන භූමියේදී අවසන් කටයුතු සඳහා නඩේසන්ගේ දේහය උතුරු පළාතට රැගෙන ගියා. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය විසින් අවමංගල්‍ය කටයුතු භාර ගන්නා ලදී.වව්නියාව, කිලිනොච්චිය, යාපනය සහ කරවෙඩ්ඩි යන ප්‍රදේශවල උපහාර උත්සව සංවිධානය කර තිබුණි. නඩේසන්ගේ දේහය, දැන් කොටි කොඩියකින් ඔතා මිනිසුන්ට ගෞරව දැක්වීම සඳහා තබා ඇත. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ සංවිධානය ශෝකයට පත් විශාල ජනකායක් සංවිධානය කළේය. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යේ ප්‍රමුඛයෝ විවිධ උත්සවවලදී මෙන්ම අවමඟුල් උත්සවයේදීද කතා කළහ. ඝාතනය හෙළා දකිමින් එල්ටීටීඊය ඊසාන දිග ප්‍රදේශයේ දැවැන්ත උද්ඝෝෂණයක් සහ හර්තාලයක් සංවිධානය කළේය. කොටි මාධ්‍ය සියල්ලම පාහේ නඩේසන්ගේ පාඩුව ගැන විලාප කියන්නට විය.

කොටි මාධ්‍ය ආයතන නඩේසන් වෙනුවෙන් බොහෝ කාලයක් හා ඉඩක් කැප කළේය. සාමාන්‍ය කොටි මාදිලියේ, ඔහුගේ මතකය වෙනුවෙන් අරමුදල් රැස් කිරීම විදේශයන්හි ආරම්භ විය. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යට අරමුදල් රැස්කිරීම මත්කුඩුවලට ගිනි ඇවිලීමක් වැනිය. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ නායක ප්‍රභාකරන් විසින් නඩේසන්ට මරණින් පසු “නාටුප්පත්‍රලාර්” (දේශප්‍රේමී) යන පදවිය පිරිනමන ලදී. නඩේසන් දේශප්‍රේමියෙකු ලෙස හුවා දැක්වීමේ මෙම ක්‍රියාවෙන් එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය උත්සාහ කළේ ඔහු ඔවුන්ගේ කෙනෙකු බව ලොවට පෙන්වීමටයි.

කනගාටුවට කරුණක් නම්, නඩේසන් කොටි ලියන්නෙකු බවට වූ හැඟීම ශක්තිමත් කිරීමට මෙම සියලු උත්සාහයන් ඉවහල් විය. කෙසේ වෙතත් සත්‍යය වෙනස් විය. මෙම සාමාන්‍ය එල්ටීටීඊ රැවටීම උදව් වූයේ නඩේස් කොටි හිතවතෙක් බවට කරුණා කල්ලියේ චෝදනාව ශක්තිමත් කිරීමට පමණි.

එල්ටීටීඊය නඩේස්ගේ මරණයෙන් පසු ඔහුගේ ප්‍රතිරූපය ඔවුන්ගේ ප්‍රයෝජනය සඳහා “කොප්” කිරීමට උත්සාහ කිරීමෙන් ඔහුට හානි කළේය. එසේ කිරීමෙන් ස්වාධීන මාධ්‍යවේදියකු ඝාතනය කිරීම නිසා ඇති විය යුතුව තිබූ පුළුල් හෙළාදැකීම එල්ටීටීඊය විකෘති කර දියාරු කළේය. ඒ වෙනුවට නඩේසන්ව මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු ලෙස ඇඳගත් කොටියෙකු ලෙස නිරූපණය කර ඇත. කරුණා පාර්ශ්වය නඩේසන්ගේ ජීවිතය නැති කළේ නම්, එල්ටීටීඊය ඔහුගේ කීර්ති නාමය විනාශ කර ඇත.

ඔහුගේ වැරදි හෝ අඩුපාඩු කුමක් වුවත්, "නෙල්ලයි" නඩේස් නඩේසන්ගේ වියෝව සහ දක්ෂ ශිල්පියා ශෝකයෙන් සිටි බවට සැකයක් නැත. ඔහුගේ බොහෝ ලිපි හොඳින් පර්යේෂණ කළ අතර බොහෝ කරුණු සහ සංඛ්‍යා තිබුණි. දත්ත සහ සංඛ්‍යාලේඛන ලබා ගැනීමට මම විටෙක ඔහුගේ ලිපි මත විශ්වාසය තබා ඇත්තෙමි.

දේශපාලන බලකිරීම් මත ඔහුගේ ස්ථාවරය කුමක් වුවත්, නඩේසන්ගේ මරණය පොදුවේ දෙමළ ප්‍රජාවට සහ විශේෂයෙන්ම මාධ්‍යවේදි සහෝදරත්වයට විශාල පාඩුවක් විය. ඔහු කුමන මත ඉදිරිපත් කළ ද නඩේසන්ගේ ඝාතනය තරයේ හෙළා දැකිය යුතුය. වසර දහඅටකට පසුවවත් මේ නොවිසඳුණු මිනීමැරුම සම්පූර්ණයෙන් විමර්ශනය කර අයියතුරෙයි නඩේසන් ඝාතනයට වගකිවයුත්තන්ට සාධාරණය ඉෂ්ට කිරීමද අවශ්‍ය වේ.
මෙම ලිපිය 2022 ජූනි 1 වැනි දින “ඩේලි එෆ්ටී” තීරුවේ “දේශපාලන ස්පන්දනය” තීරුවේ දිස්වේ. එයට මෙතැනින් ප්‍රවේශ විය හැක-

ta.title: ஊடகவியலாளர் ஐயாத்துரை நடேசன் 18 வருடங்களுக்கு முன்னர் பகல் வெளிச்சத்தில் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்டார்.
body_lines: ஊடகவியலாளர் சகோதரத்துவத்தை சேர்ந்த எந்த ஒரு உறுப்பினரின் மரணமும் வேதனையளிக்கிறது. மேலும், அதிகார பாசாங்குகளால் மக்களை அதிருப்திக்குள்ளாக்கிய ஒன்றை எழுதிய 'குற்றம்' என்பதற்காக ஒரு எழுத்தர் பட்டப்பகலில் 'தெரியாத' கொலையாளிகளால் சுட்டுக் கொல்லப்பட்டபோது.
பத்திரிகையாளர் உங்களுக்கு 25 ஆண்டுகளுக்கும் மேலாகத் தெரிந்தவராகவும், துல்லியமான செய்திகள் மற்றும் ஊக்கமளிக்கும் பார்வைகளின் ஆதாரமாகவும் பெரிதும் உதவியவராக இருந்தபோது வருத்தம் இன்னும் கடுமையானது.

தமிழ் நாளிதழான வீரகேசரியின் மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபராக கடமையாற்றிய ஐயாத்துரை நடேசன் 18 வருடங்களுக்கு முன்னர் மட்டக்களப்பு நகரின் மையப்பகுதியில் பட்டப்பகலில் கொல்லப்பட்டார். மே 29 ஞாயிற்றுக்கிழமை மட்டக்களப்பு நூலக கேட்போர் கூடத்தில் சக ஊடகவியலாளர்களால் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்பட்ட நிகழ்வில் அவருக்கு நினைவேந்தல் நிகழ்வு இடம்பெற்றது. அவரது நினைவாக ஒரு புத்தகம் வெளியிடப்பட்டது.

இந்த கொலையை விசாரிக்க இதுவரை உறுதியான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படவில்லை. நடேசன் எனக்கு 25 வருடங்களுக்கு மேலாக தெரிந்த நண்பர். நடேசன் கொல்லப்பட்ட போது, ​​அவர் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்டதை நான் எழுதியுள்ளேன். எவ்வாறாயினும், ஊடகவியலாளர் மற்றும் நண்பரின் தீர்க்கப்படாத கொலையின் கவனத்தை ஈர்க்கும் நோக்கத்துடன் நடேசனின் கொலையை மீண்டும் பார்வையிடுகிறேன்.

ஐயாத்துரை நடேசன் 2004 ஆம் ஆண்டு மே மாதம் 31 ஆம் திகதி காலை 9.35 மணியளவில் மட்டக்களப்பு நகரில் வைத்து சுட்டுக் கொல்லப்பட்டார். அவர் வேலைக்குச் செல்வதற்காக மோட்டார் சைக்கிளில் சென்று கொண்டிருந்தபோது, ​​எல்லைச் சாலையில் பாயிண்ட் ப்ளான் ரேஞ்சில் அவரை மர்ம நபர்கள் சுட்டுக் கொன்றனர். காலை 9.20 மணியளவில் மட்டக்களப்பு லேக் வீதியிலுள்ள தனது வீட்டிலிருந்து புறப்பட்ட நடேசன், சென்ட்ரல் வீதியில் உள்ள வீரகேசரி காரியாலயத்திற்கு அடுத்துள்ள பொட்டிக்கில் இருந்து தனது வீரகேசரி பிரதியை எடுப்பதை வழமையாக பின்பற்றியிருந்தார்.

நடேசன், ஒரு பத்திரிகையாளராக இருந்தாலும், வருமான வரி மதிப்பீட்டாளராகவும் பணியாற்றினார். அவர் எல்லை சாலை வழியாக சென்று தனது பார் ரோடு அலுவலகம் அருகே சென்று கொண்டிருந்த போது, ​​கொலையாளிகள் தாக்கினர். நீல நிற மோட்டார் சைக்கிளில் வந்த இருவர் - இருவரும் ஹெல்மெட் அணிந்திருந்தனர் - கொலையாளிகள். 9 மிமீ முதல் புள்ளி வெற்று வரம்பில் குறைந்தது நான்கு ஷாட்கள் சுடப்பட்டன. இருவர் நடேசனின் தோள் மற்றும் மார்பில் மோதினர். ஒருவன் அவன் கையை அடித்தான். கொலையாளிகள் சிணுங்கினார்கள். பல சாட்சிகள் இருந்தபோதிலும் எவரும் பொலிஸாரிடம் சாட்சியமளிக்க முன்வரவில்லை.

நடேசனின் பைக் கான்கிரீட் மின் கம்பத்தில் மோதியதில் அவர் தூக்கி வீசப்பட்டார். நடேசன் வாய்க்காலில் விழுந்தார். கீழே விழுந்ததில் அவரது விலா எலும்புகள் உடைந்தன. பார் ரோட்டில் உள்ள தனது பணியிடத்திலிருந்து சுமார் 200 அடி தூரத்தில் ரத்த வெள்ளத்தில் கிடந்த அவர் சிறிது நேரத்தில் அந்த இடத்திலேயே உயிரிழந்தார்.

பார் ரோடு-பவுண்டரி ரோடு பகுதி காலை நேரத்தில் மிகவும் பரபரப்பாக காணப்படும். நீண்ட நேரமாக நடேசன் வாய்க்காலில் கிடப்பதை பலர் பார்த்தனர். ஆனால், அவருக்கு உதவிக்கு யாரும் வரவில்லை. அக்காலங்களில் மட்டக்களப்பில் இருந்த அச்ச நிலை, இது போன்ற சமயங்களில் அடிப்படை மனிதப் போக்குகளைக் கூட வெளிக்காட்டிக் கொள்ள மக்கள் அச்சமடைந்தனர்.

அந்த நேரத்தில் மட்டக்களப்பு மக்கள் இரண்டு "பயங்கரவாத" சக்திகளின் பிடியில் இருந்தனர். பிரதான நீரோட்ட தமிழீழ விடுதலைப் புலிகளுக்கும், முன்னாள் புலிகளின் கிழக்கு தளபதி விநாயகமூர்த்தி முரளீதரன் என்ற “கேணல்” கருணா தலைமையிலான மட்டக்களப்பு - அம்பாறை அதிருப்தி பிரிவினருக்கும் இடையிலான மேலாதிக்க மோதலானது, கட்டுப்பாடு இன்றி உயிர்களை பறிக்கும் சூழலுக்கு வழிவகுத்தது. பிரபாகரனை ஆதரிப்பது யார், கருணாவை ஆதரிப்பது யார் என்று தெரியாததால் மக்கள் சுதந்திரமாக பேச அஞ்சினார்கள்.

சக ஊடகவியலாளர் துரைரத்தினம் மற்றும் அப்போதைய TELO மட்டக்களப்பு அமைப்பாளர் பிரசன்னா என்ற இந்திரகுமார் ஆகியோர் சம்பவ இடத்திற்குச் சென்று உயிரற்ற நடேசனின் உடலைப் பரிசோதனை செய்து அதிகாரிகளை எச்சரிக்கும்படி ஒப்படைக்கப்பட்டது. அப்போதைய மட்டக்களப்பு நீதவான் எம்.அஜ்மீர் முற்பகல் 11 மணியளவில் குறித்த இடத்திற்குச் சென்று சடலத்தை வைத்தியசாலைக்கு எடுத்துச் சென்று விசாரணைகளின் பின்னர் குடும்பத்தினரிடம் ஒப்படைக்குமாறு உத்தரவிட்டார். நடேசனின் மறைவின் சோகக் கதை இதுவாகும்.

ஏறக்குறைய 20 வருடங்களாக மட்டக்களப்பில் வசிப்பவராக இருந்தாலும் நடேசன் கிழக்கைச் சேர்ந்தவரல்ல. இவரது மனைவி கௌரி மட்டக்களப்பை சேர்ந்தவர். எனினும் நடேசன் மட்டக்களப்பை தனது பூர்வீக இடமாக ஏற்றுக்கொண்டு அப்பிரதேசத்துடன் தன்னை இணைத்துக் கொண்டார்.
மக்கள் எதிர்நோக்கும் பிரச்சனைகளை சரியாக எடுத்துரைத்தார். அவர் இறக்கும் போது நாட்டின் சிறந்த தமிழ் ஊடக ஊடகவியலாளர்களில் ஒருவராக இருந்தார்.

இறக்கும் போது 49 வயதாகும் எழுத்தர், நெல்லியட்டியைச் சேர்ந்தவர். நடேசனின் தந்தை ஐயாத்துரை கூட்டுறவு ஆய்வாளராக இருந்தவர், நேர்மைக்கும் நேர்மைக்கும் பெயர் பெற்றவர். நெல்லியடி மத்திய கல்லூரிக்கும் வதிரி வீதி சந்திப்பிற்கும் இடையில் செட்டித்தரை லேனில் நடேசனின் வீடு இருந்தது.

பல கலைஞர்கள் மற்றும் எழுத்தாளர்கள் தங்கள் கிராமப் பெயரை முன்னொட்டாக சேர்க்கும் நடைமுறைக்கு இணங்க நடேசனும் தனது பெயருக்கு முன் நெல்லியடி "நெல்லை" என்ற சுருக்கப்பட்ட பதிப்பைப் பயன்படுத்தினார். பள்ளி மற்றும் இளங்கலைப் பருவத்தில் கட்டுரைகள், சிறுகதைகள், கவிதைகள் எழுதியது நெல்லை நாடாகத்தான்.

1977ல் வீரகேசரியில் பணிபுரிந்தபோது அவரை முதன்முதலில் சந்தித்தபோது நெல்லை நாடே என்று அழைக்கப்பட்டார். நெல்லியடியில் உள்ள ஆனைப்பந்தியைச் சேர்ந்த அப்போதைய வீரகேசரி செய்தி ஆசிரியர் எஸ்.நடராஜாவை சந்திக்க நடேசன் அடிக்கடி வந்து செல்வார். பின்னர் பத்திரிக்கையாளராக, ஜி.நடேசனைப் பயன்படுத்தினார். 'ஜி' என்பது அவரது மனைவி கௌரியைக் குறிக்கிறது.

தொழில்நுட்ப ரீதியாக நடேசன் முழுநேர ஊடகவியலாளர் அல்ல. அவர் தொழில் ரீதியாக வருமான வரி மதிப்பீட்டாளராக இருந்தார். அவர் ஒரு பகுதி நேர பத்திரிகையாளராக இருந்தார், ஆனால் நடைமுறையில் பகுதி நேரம் முழு நேரமாக இருந்தது. வீரகேசரி மற்றும் சக்தி தொலைக்காட்சி மற்றும் வானொலியின் மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபராக இருந்தார். லண்டனை தளமாகக் கொண்ட சர்வதேச ஒலிபரப்பு நிறுவனத்திலும் பணியாற்றினார். அவரது பத்திரிக்கையின் அளவையும் வீச்சையும் வைத்துப் பார்க்கும்போது, ​​அன்றைய தமிழ் ஊடகங்களில் இருந்த பல முழுநேர ஊடகவியலாளர்களை விட நடேசன் மிகவும் திறமையானவர் என்று ஒருவர் உறுதியாகக் கூறலாம்.

வணிக நிர்வாகத்தில் பட்டம் பெற்ற நடேசன் சிறிது காலம் ஆசிரியரானார். பின்னர் அவர் உள்நாட்டு இறைவரித் திணைக்களத்தில் எழுத்தராகச் சேர்ந்து பின்னர் மதிப்பீட்டாளராக ஆனார். வீரகேசரியில் தன் புனைப்பெயரான “நெல்லை நாடேஸ்” என்ற பெயரில் இலவசப் பங்களிப்பாளராகக் கட்டுரைகள் எழுதி வந்தார்.

பின்னர் வீரகேசரியின் மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபரானார். நடேசன் மட்டக்களப்பில் திருமணம் செய்து கொண்டு அங்கேயே குடியேறினார். "நெல்லை" 'ஜி' (கௌரி) க்கு வழிவகுத்தது. அவர்களுக்கு இரண்டு ஆண் குழந்தைகள் மற்றும் இரண்டு பெண் குழந்தைகள் என நான்கு குழந்தைகள் இருந்தனர்.

வீரகேசரி மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபர் ஒருவர் பணியின் போது கொல்லப்பட்டார் என்ற செய்தி என்னை மிகவும் பாதித்தது. வீரகேசரியில் பத்திரிகையாளராக இருந்த எனக்கு வாழ்க்கையின் மகிழ்ச்சியான மற்றும் சவாலான காலகட்டங்களில் ஒன்று நான் 1977 இல் மட்டக்களப்பு அலுவலக நிருபராக மூன்று மாதங்கள் பணிபுரிந்த காலம். (ஜூன் மற்றும் நவம்பர் - டிசம்பர்). வீரகேசரி அப்போது ஒரு சிறந்த பத்திரிக்கையாளரான வி.எஸ். கதிர்காமத்தம்பி மட்டக்களப்பு செய்தியாளராக. அப்போது நான் அவரை இரண்டு முறை தற்காலிகமாக மாற்ற வேண்டியிருந்தது.

கதிர்காமத்தம்பி மற்றுமொரு நெருங்கிய நண்பராக இருந்து ஓய்வு பெற்ற பின்னர் நித்தியானந்தன் வீரகேசரியின் மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபரானார். தீவிர தமிழ் தேசியவாதியான நித்தி, விடுதலைப் புலிகளுடன் அதிக ஈடுபாடு கொண்டவர். IPKF காலத்தில், IPKF-க்கு ஆதரவான குழுவான EPRLF-ஐச் சேர்ந்த சிலரால் நித்தி கொடூரமாக கத்தியால் குத்தப்பட்டார். அப்போது இந்திய தூதர் ஜே.என். அப்போது நித்தியின் பத்திரிக்கையாளர் நண்பர்களின் வேண்டுகோளுக்கு இணங்க, அவசர மருத்துவ சிகிச்சைக்காக நித்தியை உடனடியாக விமானம் மூலம் கொழும்புக்கு அழைத்துச் செல்ல தீட்சித் ஏற்பாடு செய்தார்.

குணமடைந்த நித்தி கொழும்பு வீரகேசரி அலுவலகத்தில் பணிபுரிந்தார். இந்திய இராணுவம் வெளியேறியதும் மட்டக்களப்புக்குத் திரும்பி விடுதலைப் புலிகள் இயக்கத்தில் முழுநேர உறுப்பினராகச் சேர்ந்தார். பின்னர் அவர் இலங்கை இராணுவத்தால் பதுங்கியிருந்து கொல்லப்பட்டார். நடேசன் நித்திக்குப் பிறகு நடிப்பாகவும் பின்னர் நிரந்தர மட்டக்களப்பு நிருபராகவும் ஆனார்.

நடேசனின் கொலையாளிகள் யார் என்று தமக்கு தெரியாது என பொலிஸார் கூறிய போதிலும், அவர்கள் யார் என்பது மட்டக்களப்பு மக்களுக்கு நன்கு தெரியும். “மட்டக்களப்பு-அம்பாறை விடுதலைப் புலிகள்” எனப்படும் துரோகித் தலைவர் “கேணல்” கருணாவின் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் பிரிவைச் சேர்ந்தவர்களே இந்தக் கொலையை மேற்கொண்டனர் என்பது மட்டக்களப்பில் பகிரங்கமான இரகசியமாக இருந்தது.

பின்னர் அவர்கள் "தமிழ் மக்கள் விடுதலைப் புலிகள்" (தமிழ் மக்கள் விடுதலைப் புலிகள்) என்ற புதிய அரசியல்-இராணுவ அமைப்பை உருவாக்கினர். நடேசனைக் கொன்ற பின்னர், விடுதலைப் புலிகளின் கருணா தரப்பினர், அவர் பிரபாகரனின் விசுவாசி என்று குற்றம் சாட்டி நியாயப்படுத்த முயன்றனர். மறுபுறம் பிரதான நீரோட்ட விடுதலைப் புலிகள் அவரைத் தங்களுடைய ஒருவராகக் கூறி பிரச்சார மைலேஜைப் பெற முயன்றனர்.

கடந்த நூற்றாண்டின் 70 மற்றும் 80 களில் ஒரு தமிழ் தேசியவாதியாக இருந்தாலும், நடேசன் ஒரு இனவாத - ஜனரஞ்சகவாதி என்பதை விட இடதுசாரியாக இருந்தார். தமிழ்ப் போர்க்குணம் வளர்ந்த போது, ​​நாடேஸ் புலிகளை விட ஈழ மக்கள் புரட்சிகர விடுதலை முன்னணியுடன் (EPRLF) அதிகமாக இணைந்திருந்தது. ஈபிஆர்எல்எவ் முன்னாள் வடகிழக்கு முதலமைச்சர் அண்ணாமலை வரதராஜப்பெருமாளுடன் நாடேஸ் நெருங்கிய தொடர்பு கொண்டிருந்தார்.

நடேசும் வரதனும் யாழ்ப்பாணப் பல்கலைக் கழகத்தில் சமகாலத்தவர்களாக இருந்து பின்னர் நெல்லியடி கல்வி நிலையத்தில் ஒன்றாகக் கற்பித்துள்ளனர். வடகிழக்கு மாகாணசபை உருவாக்கப்பட்ட போது நடேசன் அரசாங்கப் பணியில் இருந்து விலகி வரதராஜப்பெருமாளின் பத்திரிகை அதிகாரியாக நியமிக்கப்பட்டார். அவரது உத்தியோகபூர்வ தலைப்பு 'தகவல் அதிகாரி' என்று நான் நினைக்கிறேன். முரண்பாடாக வடக்கு - கிழக்கு மாகாண சபை இருந்தபோது நாடேஸ் ஒரு உத்தியோகபூர்வ தணிக்கையாளராகவும் இருந்தார்.

நடேசன் தனது கடமைகளை திறம்பட ஆற்றினார். ஒருபுறம் தமிழ் ஊடகங்களை புலிகள் அச்சுறுத்தி வரும் நிலையில், வடகிழக்கு மாகாண சபையின் செயற்பாடுகளை சாதகமாக முன்னிறுத்துவது ஒரு மகத்தான பணியாகும். Nades அவ்வாறு செய்தார், அடிக்கடி ஆசிரியர்கள் மற்றும் நிர்வாகப் பணியாளர்கள் மீது 'அழுத்தம்' செலுத்தினார். ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப்-க்கு ஆதரவான செய்திகளை வெளியிடுவதற்காக நாடேஸ் எப்படி அடிக்கடி மறைமுகமான அச்சுறுத்தல்களை விடுப்பார் என்று ஒரு ஆசிரியர் என்னிடம் கூறினார்.

1990 இல் சபை கலைக்கப்பட்டு பெருமாள் உட்பட ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப்-ன் பெரும்பாலோர் இலங்கையை விட்டு ஓடிய போது நாடே அதை பின்பற்றவில்லை. அவர் நாட்டை விட்டு இந்தியாவிற்கு தப்பிச் செல்வதை விட விடுதலைப் புலிகளுடன் தனது வாய்ப்புகளைப் பயன்படுத்த விரும்பினார். நாடேஸ் விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் ‘துரோகி’ என்று கைது செய்யப்பட்டு பதுங்கு குழிச் சிறையில் அடைக்கப்பட்டார். உடல் மற்றும் மனரீதியான சித்திரவதைகளுக்கு ஆளானார். வடகிழக்கு மாகாண சபையின் ஒரு ஊழியர் மட்டுமே தனது கடமையைச் செய்கிறேன் என்பதே நடேசனின் நிலைப்பாடாக இருந்தது.

இறுதியாக, நடேசனின் சகோதரர் சிவநாதன், ஒரு செழிப்பான மில் உரிமையாளர், அவரது விடுதலையைப் பெறுவதற்கு பெரும் நன்கொடையை செலுத்த வேண்டியிருந்தது. நடேசனை துரோகி என்று தடுத்து வைத்திருக்கும் விடுதலைப் புலிகள், பணம் கொடுக்கவில்லை என்றால், பலரைப் போல அவரையும் சிறைபிடித்து கொன்றிருக்கலாம். நடேசன் கொல்லப்பட்ட பின்னர் அதே விடுதலைப் புலிகள் தேசபக்தி பட்டங்களை பொழிவதுடன் அவரது நினைவாக இரங்கல் கூட்டங்களையும் கண்டன ஆர்ப்பாட்டங்களையும் நடத்த ஆரம்பித்தனர்.

கனடாவில் வாழ்ந்து இலங்கையைப் பற்றி எழுதும் ஊடகவியலாளர் என்ற வகையில் நான் நடேசனுடன் பல வருடங்களாக தொலைபேசியில் தொடர்பில் இருந்தேன். அவர் கிழக்கில் நடந்த நிகழ்வுகள் பற்றிய நம்பகமான தகவல் ஆதாரமாக இருந்தார். அவர் ஒரு வலுவான தமிழ்த் தேசியப் போக்கை முன்வைத்த போதிலும், அவர் எந்த வகையிலும் புலிகளின் கூட்டாளி அல்ல.

ஆயினும்கூட, அவர் ஒரு 'பாதுகாப்பான' போக்கைக் கடைப்பிடிக்க வேண்டியிருந்தது. இலங்கையில் தன்னால் ஒருபோதும் தெரிவிக்க முடியாத நிகழ்வுகளைப் பற்றி அடிக்கடி என்னிடம் கூறுவார். அச்சில் எழுதியதும், போனில் பேசியதும் சில சமயம் வித்தியாசமாக இருந்தது. “எங்களால் முழு உண்மையையும் எழுத முடியாது. குறைந்த பட்சம் நீங்கள் ஏதாவது செய்யுங்கள், ”என்று அவர் கூறுவார்.

இது வடகிழக்கில் உள்ள தமிழ் ஊடகவியலாளர்கள் எதிர்கொள்ளும் மிகப்பெரிய இருத்தலியல் பிரச்சனையாகும். வீரகேசரியின் மாகாண நிருபராக யாழ்ப்பாணத்திலும் மட்டக்களப்பிலும் பணியாற்றிய எனக்கு வெளிமாவட்ட நிருபர் மீதான அழுத்தங்கள் பற்றி நன்றாகவே தெரியும். பின்னாளில், யுத்த சூழ்நிலை இந்த ஊடகவியலாளர்கள் மீது பாரிய சுமையை சுமத்தியது. போரின் ஆண்டுகளில் பலவீனமான அமைதியின் சுருக்கமான இடைவெளிகள் கூட வடகிழக்கில் உள்ள எழுத்தாளர்களுக்கு எந்த நிவாரணத்தையும் தரவில்லை.

வடக்கு கிழக்கில் வாழ்ந்த எழுத்தாளர்கள் அன்றைய காலத்தில் புலிகளின் மறைமுக அழுத்தங்களுக்கு முகம் கொடுக்க வேண்டியிருந்தது. ஆயுதப் படைகள் மற்றும் பிற புலிகள் அல்லாத தமிழ் குழுக்களிடமிருந்தும் அழுத்தம் இருந்தது. எவ்வாறாயினும், மிகப் பெரிய அச்சுறுத்தல் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் மற்றும் இலங்கையில் உள்ள அனைத்து தமிழ் செய்தித்தாள்களும் அப்போது புலிகளுக்கு ஆதரவாக இருந்தன.

தமிழ் தேசியவாதமே தமிழ் ஊடகங்களின் பிரதான ஆதாரமாக இருக்கும் அதே வேளையில், புலிகளின் காரணி அப்போது தரமான அழிவுகரமான மாற்றத்தைக் கொண்டு வந்தது. இந்தப் பின்னணியில் ஊடகவியலாளர்களை அவர்களின் காலணியில் நடக்காமல் நடேசனின் நிலைப்பாட்டில் நியாயந்தீர்க்க ஒருவர் தயங்குவார்.

புலனாய்வு ஏஜென்சிகள் முதல் பிபிசி வரை எந்தவொரு வாங்குபவருக்கும் ஒரு புலி வரிசையை செருகி, பிரமாதமான பிரச்சாரங்களை வழங்கிய சில 'புளஃப் மாஸ்டர்கள்' போலல்லாமல், நடேசன் முடிந்தவரை முன்னேற்றங்கள் பற்றிய சரியான படத்தை முன்வைக்க முயன்றார். லண்டனை தளமாகக் கொண்ட புலிகளுக்கு ஆதரவான ஐபிசி வானொலியில் நான் அடிக்கடி அவருடைய அறிக்கைகளைக் கேட்டேன். அவருடைய வீரகேசரி ஞாயிறு பத்தியையும் நான் தவறாமல் படிப்பேன்.

பத்தியின் குறிப்பிடத்தக்க விஷயம் என்னவென்றால், அவர் உண்மைகளை சிதைக்கவில்லை. அவர் சில 'சிக்கல்' விவரங்களை விட்டுவிட்டார், ஆனால் முற்றிலும் பொய்களை எழுதவில்லை. அவரது கருத்துக்களும் மற்றவர்களைப் போல புலிகளின் கட்டுக்கடங்காத கோமாளித்தனத்திற்கு செல்லவில்லை. நடேசன் அவர்களே ஒரு தமிழ் தேசியவாதி மற்றும் அவர் எழுதியதில் பெரும்பாலானவை அந்தக் கண்ணோட்டத்தில் இருந்தவை. எனினும் இது அவரை ‘புலி’யாக மாற்றவில்லை, ஏனெனில் அவரது மறைவுக்குப் பிறகு அவரை புலிகள் மற்றும் கருணா அணியினர் சித்தரிக்க முயன்றனர்.

நடேசனின் கொலையைத் தேடிய கருணா சார்பு இணையத்தளமான “நெருப்பு” நாடேஸை “வன்னிப்புலிப்பத்திரிகையாளர்” (வன்னிப் புலிகளின் ஊடகவியலாளர்) என்று வர்ணித்தது. ஒரு கொடூரமான கொலையை நியாயப்படுத்த இறந்த மனிதனின் பெயரைக் களங்கப்படுத்துவது ஒரு பொதுவான புலி பண்பாகும். கருணா தரப்பினர் இந்த விடயத்தில் அதன் வேர்களை கடைப்பிடித்து வருகின்றனர் என்பதில் சந்தேகமில்லை.

பிரபாகரன் தலைமையிலான புலிகள் நடேசனின் மரணத்தை பயன்படுத்திக் கொள்ளத் தொடங்கினர். நடேசனின் மரணத்தைக் கண்டித்தும் இரங்கல் தெரிவித்தும் அரசியல் லாபத்தைப் பெறுவதற்காக புலிகள் உலகளாவிய பிரச்சாரத்தை ஏற்பாடு செய்தனர். சேனாதி தலைமையிலான புலிகள் அணியினர் இறுதிச் சடங்கிற்குச் சென்று உடலில் புலிக்கொடியை போர்த்தியுள்ளனர். இதற்கு நடேசனின் சகோதரி எதிர்ப்பு தெரிவித்தார். கொடி அகற்றப்பட்டது.

பின்னர் நடேசனின் உடல் வடமாகாணத்திற்கு எடுத்துச் செல்லப்பட்டு வத்திராயிருப்பு ஆலங்கட்டி மயானத்தில் தகனம் செய்யப்பட்டது. இறுதிச் சடங்குகளை விடுதலைப் புலிகள் ஏற்றுக்கொண்டனர்.வவுனியா, கிளிநொச்சி, யாழ்ப்பாணம் மற்றும் கரவெட்டியில் அஞ்சலி நிகழ்வுகள் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்பட்டிருந்தன. நடேசனின் உடல், புலிக்கொடி போர்த்தப்பட்ட நிலையில் மக்கள் அஞ்சலிக்காக வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. விடுதலைப் புலிகள் பெருந்திரளான துக்கக் கூட்டத்தை ஏற்பாடு செய்தனர். எல்.ரீ.ரீ.ஈ முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் பல்வேறு விழாக்களிலும், இறுதிச் சடங்குகளிலும் பேசினார்கள். இந்தக் கொலையைக் கண்டித்து வடகிழக்கில் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் மாபெரும் ஆர்ப்பாட்டம் மற்றும் ஹர்த்தாலை ஏற்பாடு செய்தனர். கிட்டத்தட்ட அனைத்து புலி ஊடகங்களும் நடேசனின் இழப்பு விளம்பர குமட்டல் பற்றி புலம்ப ஆரம்பித்தன.

புலி ஊடக அமைப்புகள் நடேசனுக்காக அதிக நேரத்தையும் இடத்தையும் அர்ப்பணித்தன. வழக்கமான புலி பாணியில், அவரது நினைவாக வெளிநாடுகளில் நிதி சேகரிப்பு தொடங்கியது. விடுதலைப் புலிகளுக்கு நிதி சேகரிப்பு என்பது ஒரு கும்பலுக்கு நெருப்புப்பொறி போன்றது. புலிகளின் தலைவர் பிரபாகரன் நடேசனுக்கு மரணத்திற்குப் பின் "நாட்டுப்பற்றாளர்" (தேசபக்தர்) என்ற பட்டத்தை வழங்கினார். நடேசனை தேசபக்தர் என்று அழைக்கும் இந்தச் செயலின் மூலம் அவர் தங்களில் ஒருவர் என்பதை உலகுக்குக் காட்ட புலிகள் முயன்றனர்.

துரதிர்ஷ்டவசமாக இந்த முயற்சிகள் அனைத்தும் நடேசன் ஒரு புலி எழுத்தாளர் என்ற எண்ணத்தை வலுப்படுத்த உதவியது. ஆனால் உண்மை வேறு விதமாக இருந்தது. புலிகளின் இந்த வழமையான ஏமாற்று, நடேஸ் ஒரு புலி கூட்டாளி என்ற கருணா குழுவின் குற்றச்சாட்டை வலுப்படுத்த உதவியது.

புலிகள் அவரது மரணத்திற்குப் பிறகு நாடேஸை தங்கள் நலனுக்காக அவரது உருவத்தை "கூட்டு" செய்ய முயன்றனர். இதன் மூலம் விடுதலைப் புலிகள் ஒரு சுதந்திர ஊடகவியலாளர் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்டமைக்காக எழுந்திருக்க வேண்டிய பரவலான கண்டனத்தை சிதைத்து நீர்த்துப்போகச் செய்தனர். அதற்குப் பதிலாக நடேசன் பத்திரிகையாளர் வேடத்தில் புலியாகச் சித்தரிக்கப்பட்டார். கருணா தரப்பினர் நடேசனின் உயிரைப் பறித்திருந்தால், புலிகள் அவரது நற்பெயரை அழித்துவிட்டனர்.

அவரது குறைகள் அல்லது குறைபாடுகள் எதுவாக இருந்தாலும், "நெல்லை" நாடேஸ் நடேசனின் மறைவிற்கும், புத்திசாலித்தனமான கைவினைஞருக்கும் இரங்கல் தெரிவித்தது என்பதில் சந்தேகமில்லை. அவரது பெரும்பாலான கட்டுரைகள் நன்கு ஆய்வு செய்யப்பட்டன மற்றும் நிறைய உண்மைகள் மற்றும் புள்ளிவிவரங்களைக் கொண்டிருந்தன. தரவுகள் மற்றும் புள்ளிவிவரங்களைப் பெற நான் சில சமயங்களில் அவருடைய கட்டுரைகளை நம்பியிருக்கிறேன்.

அரசியல் நிர்ப்பந்தங்கள் காரணமாக அவரது நிலைப்பாடு என்னவாக இருந்தாலும், நடேசனின் மரணம் பொதுவாக தமிழ் சமூகத்திற்கும் குறிப்பாக ஊடகவியலாளர் சகோதரத்துவத்திற்கும் பெரும் இழப்பாகும். அவர் எந்தக் கருத்தை முன்வைத்தாலும், நடேசனின் கொலையை வன்மையாகக் கண்டிக்க வேண்டும். பதினெட்டு ஆண்டுகளுக்குப் பிறகும் தீர்க்கப்படாத இந்தக் கொலையை முழுமையாக விசாரித்து ஐயாத்துரை நடேசனின் கொலைக்குக் காரணமானவர்களுக்கு நீதி வழங்குவதும் அவசியம்.
இந்தக் கட்டுரை ஜூன் 1, 2022 தேதியிட்ட “டெய்லி எஃப்டி” பத்திரிக்கையின் “அரசியல் துடிப்பு” நெடுவரிசையில் தோன்றுகிறது. அதை இங்கே அணுகலாம்-

en.title: Assassination of Journalist  Aiyathurai Nadesan  in Broad Daylight 18 Years ago
body_lines: The death of any member of the journalistic fraternity is distressing. More so when a scribe is gunned down in broad daylight by ‘unknown’ assassins for the ‘crime’ of writing something that displeased people with pretensions of power.
The sadness is even more acute when the journalist was someone known to you for more than 25 years and had been immensely helpful as a source of accurate news and stimulating views.

Aiyathurai Nadesan who  served as Batticaloa correspondent of the Tamil daily “Virakesari”   was killed in broad daylight 18 years ago in the heart of  Batticaloa town. He was commemorated on Sunday May 29th at an event organized by fellow journalists  in the Batticaloa Library Auditorium. A book  was released in his memory.

No concrete action has been taken to investigate the murder so far. Nadesan was a friend whom I had known for over 25 years. I have written about Nadesan’s assassination, when he was killed. I shall however re-visit Nadesan’s killing with the intention of drawing attention to an unsolved murder of a journalist and friend.

Aiyathurai Nadesan was shot dead  on May 31st 2004 at about 9.35 a.m. in Batticaloa town. He was riding his motor cycle to work when the assailants shot him dead at point blank range on Boundary Road. Leaving his home on Lake Road, Batticaloa at 9. 20 a.m. Nadesan had followed his usual practice of picking up his Virakesari copy from the boutique next to the Virakesari office on Central Road.

Nadesan, though a journalist worked as an income tax assessor, too. He was going along Boundary Road and nearing his Bar Road office, when the assassins struck. Two men on a blue motor cycle — both wearing helmets — were the killers. At least four shots were fired at point blank range from a 9 mm. Two hit Nadesan’s shoulder and chest. One struck his hand. The killers whizzed away. There were many witnesses but none came forward to give evidence to the Police.

Nadesan’s bike knocked against a concrete lamp post and he was thrown off. Nadesan fell into a drain. The fall had resulted in his ribs getting fractured. He lay bleeding about 200 yards away from his workplace on Bar Road and died at the spot after a while.

The Bar Road-Boundary Road area is a very busy place in the morning. Many people saw Nadesan lying in the drain for a long time. Yet no one came to his aid. Such was the state of fear in Batticaloa during those times, that people were scared to display even the most basic human tendencies at times like these.

The people of Batticaloa were in the grip of two contending “terrorist” forces at that time. The clash for supremacy between the mainstream Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam (LTTE) and the Batticaloa – Amparai dissident faction led by ex-tiger eastern commander Vinayagamoorthy Muraleetharan alias “Col” Karuna had led to a situation where lives were being snuffed out without restraint. People were afraid to talk freely as they did not know who supported Prabhakaran  and who supported Karuna.

It was left to a fellow journalist, Thurairatnam and the then TELO Batticaloa Organiser Indrakumar alias Prasanna to go to the spot, examine the body of the lifeless Nadesan,  and alert the authorities. The then Batticaloa Magistrate M. Ajmeer went to the place at about 11 a.m. and ordered that the body be taken to the hospital and handed over to the family after an inquest. This then was the sad tale of Nadesan’s demise.

Though a resident of Batticaloa for nearly 20 years, Nadesan was not an easterner. His wife Gowri was from Batticaloa. Nadesan however had adopted Batticaloa as his native place and integrated himself with the region.
He spotlighted the problems facing the people aptly. He was easily one of the best Tamil media journalists in the country at the time of his death.

The scribe  who was 49 at the time of his demise, hailed from Nelliaddy.Nadesan’s father Aiyathurai was a Cooperative Inspector with an impeccable reputation for honesty and integrity.  Nadesan’s house was down Chettitharai Lane between Nelliaddy Central College and the Vathiri Road junction.

Conforming to the practice adopted by many artistes and writers of adding their village name as a prefix Nadesan too used the condensed version of Nelliaddy “Nellai” before his name. It was as “Nellai Nades” that he wrote articles, short stories and poems during his school and undergraduate days.

When I first met him in 1977 while working at the Virakesari, he was known as Nellai Nades. Nadesan used to drop in frequently to meet the then Virakesari News Editor S. Nadarajah who was also from Anaipanthy in Nelliaddy. Later as a journalist, he used the by- line G. Nadesan. The ‘G’ denoted his wife Gowri.

Technically Nadesan was not a full-time journalist. He was an Income Tax Assessor by profession. He was a part time journalist but in practical terms the part time was full time. He was the Batticaloa correspondent for the Virakesari and also for Shakthi TV and radio. He also worked for the London based International Broadcasting Corporation. Given the volume and scope of his journalism, one could safely say that Nadesan was far more productive than many full-time journalists in the Tamil media those days.

After obtaining a degree in Business Administration, Nadesan became a teacher for a while. Later he joined the Inland Revenue Department as a clerk and subsequently became an Assessor. He used to write articles as a free-lance contributor to the Virakesari under his pen name “Nellai Nades.”
He later became the Virakesari’s Batticaloa Correspondent. Nadesan married in Batticaloa and settled down there. The “Nellai” gave way to ‘G’ (Gowri). They had four children, two boys and two girls.

The news of a Virakesari Batticaloa correspondent being killed on the line of duty was and is of poignant impact to me. One of the happiest and challenging periods of life for me as a journalist on the Virakesari was when I worked as Batticaloa staff correspondent for three months in 1977. (June and Nov – Dec). The Virakesari then had a brilliant journalist, V.S. Kathirgamathamby as Batticaloa correspondent. I had to replace him twice on a temporary basis then.

After Kathirgamathamby retired another close friend, Nithianandan became Batticaloa correspondent of the Virakesari. Nithy, an ardent Tamil nationalist got too involved with the LTTE. During the time of the IPKF, Nithy was viciously stabbed by some members of the pro-IPKF group, the EPRLF. Then Indian envoy J.N. Dixit arranged for immediate air lifting of Nithy to Colombo for urgent medical treatment at the request of Nithy’s journalist friends then.

After recovering Nithy worked in the Colombo Virakesari office. When the Indian army left he returned to Batticaloa and joined the LTTE as a full time member. He was later ambushed and killed by the Sri Lankan Army. Nadesan became the acting and later permanent Batticaloa Correspondent after Nithy.

Though the Police said that they had no idea who Nadesan’s killers were, the people of Batticaloa knew fully well, who they were. It was an open secret in Batticaloa that the killing was carried out by members of renegade leader “Col” Karuna’s  LTTE faction known as “Batticaloa-Amparai Liberation Tigers.”

Subsequently they formed a new politico-military organisation called “Thamil Makkal Viduthalaip Puligal”  (Tami Peoples Liberation Tigers). After killing Nadesan the Karuna faction of the LTTE tried to justify it by accusing him of being a Prabhakaran loyalist. The mainstream LTTE on the other hand tried to derive propaganda mileage by claiming him as one of their own.

Though a Tamil nationalist in the ’70s and ’80s of the last century, Nadesan was more of a leftist than an ethno – populist. When Tamil militancy grew, Nades was more aligned with the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) than the LTTE. Nades was closely associated with former EPRLF Northeastern Chief Minister Annamalai Varadarajaperumal.

Nades and Varathan had been contemporaries at the Jaffna University and had also taught together at a Nelliaddy tuition centre later. When the northeast provincial council was formed Nadesan got himself seconded from government service and got appointed as Varatharajaperumal’s press officer. I think his official title was ‘Information Officer.’ Ironically Nades was also an unofficial censor when the North -Eastern Provincial Council was in existence.

Nadesan discharged his duties efficiently. With the LTTE threatening the Tamil media on the one hand, it was a formidable task to project the northeast provincial council activities in a favourable light. Nades did so, often exerting ‘pressure’ on editors and management personnel. One editor told me how Nades would often utter veiled threats in order to get pro-EPRLF news published.

When the council was dissolved in 1990 and the bulk of EPRLF including Perumal fled from Sri Lanka, Nades did not follow suit. He opted to take his chances with the LTTE rather than fleeing the country to India. Nades was arrested as a ‘traitor’ by the LTTE and detained in a bunker prison. He was subjected to physical and mental torture. Nadesan’s stand was that he was only an employee of the Northeast Provincial Council, doing his duty.

Finally, Nadesan’s brother Sivanathan, a prosperous mill owner had to pay a hefty donation to secure his release. The LTTE that detained Nadesan as a traitor may very well have killed him in captivity like many others if not for the money being paid. After Nadesan was killed the same LTTE started showering patriotic titles and organising condolence meetings and protest demonstrations in his memory.

As a journalist living in Canada and writing about Sri Lanka, I kept in touch with Nadesan on the phone for several years. He was a reliable source of information about events in the east. Though he espoused a strong Tamil nationalist line he was by no means a LTTE acolyte.

Nevertheless he had to adopt a ‘safe’ course. Often he would tell me of happenings which he himself could never report in Sri Lanka. What he wrote in print and what he said on the phone were sometimes different. “We can’t write the whole truth. At least you do something,” he would say.

This was a tremendous existential problem encountered by Tamil journalists in the northeast. Having worked as provincial correspondent for the Virakesari both in Jaffna and in Batticaloa, I know only too well the pressures on the outstation correspondent. Later on, the war situation imposed an immense burden on these journalists. Even the brief interludes of fragile peace during the years of war did not bring any relief to the scribes in the northeast.

The scribes living in the North -east had to face indirect LTTE pressure in those days. There was also pressure from the armed forces and even other non-Tiger Tamil groups. However, the biggest threat was the LTTE and almost all Tamil newspapers in Sri Lanka toed a pro-Tiger line then.

While Tamil nationalism is the staple sustenance of the Tamil media, the LTTE factor brought about a qualitatively destructive change then. Against this backdrop one would hesitate to judge journalists in Nadesan’s position without having walked in their shoes.

Unlike some ‘bluff masters’ who plugged a Tiger line and peddled fantastic bits of propaganda to any buyer, ranging from intelligence agencies to the BBC, Nadesan had striven to present a correct picture of developments as far as possible. I often listened to his reports in the London based pro-LTTE IBC Radio. I also read his Virakesari Sunday column regularly.

The significant thing about the column was that he did not distort facts. He left out some ‘problematic’ details, but never wrote utter falsehoods. His comments too never went to the extent of unbridled LTTE sycophancy like some others.Nadesan himself was a Tamil nationalist and much of what he wrote was from that perspective. This however did not make him a ‘Tiger’ as both the LTTE and Karuna faction tried to portray him after his demise

The pro – Karuna website “Neruppu” which scooped the Nadesan killing described Nades as a “Wannippulippathirigaiyaalar” ( journalist of the Wanni tigers). Tarnishing a dead man’s name to justify a dastardly killing is a typical Tiger trait. The Karuna faction was no doubt adhering to its roots in this matter.

The Prabhakaran led LTTE began capitalising on Nadesan’s death. The Tigers organised a worldwide campaign condemning and mourning Nadesan’s death to obtain political mileage. A team of Tigers led by Senathi went to the funeral house and wrapped a Tiger flag around the body. Nadesan’s sister objected. The flag was removed.

Later Nadesan’s body was taken to the Northern Province for cremation at the Aalankatti cemetery in Vathiri. The LTTE took over the funeral arrangements.Homage ceremonies were organised in Vavuniya, Kilinochchi, Jaffna and Karaveddy. Nadesan’s body, now wrapped in a Tiger flag lay in state for people to pay their respects. The LTTE orchestrated large crowds of mourners. Leading LTTE figures spoke at the various ceremonies as well as the funeral itself. The LTTE organised a massive demonstration and hartal in the northeast to condemn the killing. Almost all the Tiger media started lamenting Nadesan’s loss ad nauseam.

Tiger media organs devoted much time and space to Nadesan. In typical Tiger fashion, fund raising in his memory commenced overseas. Fund raising to the LTTE was like a fire hydrant to a mongrel.The LTTE Leader Prabhakaran conferred upon Nadesan the posthumous title “Naatuppattraalar” (Patriot). By this action of dubbing Nadesan a patriot the LTTE tried to show the world that he was one of theirs.

Sadly all these efforts helped to strengthen the impression that Nadesan was a Tiger scribe. The truth however was different. This typical LTTE deception only helped to reinforce the Karuna Group charge that Nades was a Tiger associate.

The LTTE damaged Nades after his death by trying to “coopt” his image for their benefit. By doing so the LTTE distorted and diluted the widespread condemnation that should have arisen because an independent journalist was assassinated. Instead Nadesan was depicted as a Tiger in journalist garb. If the Karuna faction had taken Nadesan’s life, the LTTE had destroyed his reputation.

Whatever his faults or deficiencies, there is no doubt that “Nellai” Nades was mourning Nadesan’s death and clever craftsman. Most of his articles were well researched and had a lot of facts and figures. I have at times relied on his articles to get data and statistics.

Whatever his stance because of political compulsions, Nadesan’s death was a great loss to the Tamil community in general and the journalist fraternity in particular. Irrespective of the views he espoused, Nadesan’s killing has to be condemned forthrightly. It is also necessary to investigate this unsolved murder fully even  eighteen years later and mete out justice to those responsible for killing Aiyathurai Nadesan.
